section_name: Other Financing Methods in Charter of Home-rule Municipality
chapter_title: Gen. Provisions Relating to Mun. Streets
text:
(a) A home-rule municipality by charter may adopt any other method of financing an improvement described by Section 311.091 (Assessment for Street Improvement in Home-rule Municipality) , 311.092 (Assessment for Opening, Extending, or Widening of Street or Alley in Home-rule Municipality) , or 311.093 (Assessment for Sidewalk in Home-rule Municipality) .

(b) Another method adopted by charter for financing an improvement described by Section 311.092 (Assessment for Opening, Extending, or Widening of Street or Alley in Home-rule Municipality) must:

(1) charge the cost of the improvement to the property and to the owner of the property specially benefitted in enhanced value by the improvement and located in the territory in which the improvement is made; and

(2) describe the manner of:

(A) appointing commissioners;

(B) giving notice; and

(C) fixing assessments or otherwise providing for the payment of the improvement.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 311. Gen. Provisions Relating to Mun. Streets
##### § 311.094 — Other Financing Methods in Charter of Home-rule Municipality

(a) A home-rule municipality by charter may adopt any other method of financing an improvement described by Section 311.091 (Assessment for Street Improvement in Home-rule Municipality) , 311.092 (Assessment for Opening, Extending, or Widening of Street or Alley in Home-rule Municipality) , or 311.093 (Assessment for Sidewalk in Home-rule Municipality) .

(b) Another method adopted by charter for financing an improvement described by Section 311.092 (Assessment for Opening, Extending, or Widening of Street or Alley in Home-rule Municipality) must:

    (1) charge the cost of the improvement to the property and to the owner of the property specially benefitted in enhanced value by the improvement and located in the territory in which the improvement is made; and

    (2) describe the manner of:

        (A) appointing commissioners;

        (B) giving notice; and

        (C) fixing assessments or otherwise providing for the payment of the improvement.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: Another method adopted by charter for financing an improvement described by Section 311.092 (Assessment for Opening, Extending, or Widening of Street or Alley in Home-rule Municipality) must:

charge the cost of the improvement to the property and to the owner of the property specially benefitted in enhanced value by the improvement and located in the territory in which the improvement is made; and

subsections.label: C
subsections.text: fixing assessments or otherwise providing for the payment of the improvement.
